_note: PLACEHOLDER guided check-in template (shared by all delegates). Replace wording with the client's real reception/passport/program-name steps when provided.
title: Guided check-in
intro: Follow these steps when you arrive at the hotel. This is placeholder wording and will be finalised before the event.

steps.title: Go to reception
steps.detail: Head to the hotel reception/front desk on arrival.

steps.title: Present your passport / ID
steps.detail: Have your passport or a government-issued photo ID ready.

steps.title: Staff find you on the list
steps.detail: The desk has the delegate rooming list; they will locate your booking.

steps.title: State your program name
steps.detail: Mention you are attending the CIPES program so staff apply the correct rate and inclusions.

steps.title: Receive your room allocation
steps.detail: Collect your key card and note your room number, breakfast times, and WiFi.

bring: Booking reference (shown on your Hotel tab)
